items.title: Police dismantle Kratos phishing platform, arrest developer
items.summary: Authorities in Germany and the U.S. dismantled the central infrastructure of Kratos, a phishing-as-a-service (PhaaS) platform with global reach, and its developer was arrested in Indonesia. [...]

items.title: FakeGit campaign uses 7,600 GitHub repos to push SmartLoader malware
items.summary: A large-scale operation dubbed 'FakeGit' is pushing SmartLoader and StealC malware through 7,600 malicious GitHub repositories that accumulated more than 14 million downloads. [...]

items.title: Ransomware Is Accelerating, But It's Not Because of AI
items.summary: Researchers pointed to fragmentation of the ransomware ecosystem, the emergence of new attackers, and expansion of attacks on less defended organizations.

items.title: Using LLMs to Find and Prioritize Vulnerabilities Is No Easy Task
items.summary: The latest large language models have high false-positive rates and fail to take into account the context of scans, leading to more work for AppSec professionals.

items.title: Critical SharePoint RCE flaw exploited to steal machine keys
items.summary: Hackers are actively exploiting the critical CVE-2026-50522 vulnerability in Microsoft SharePoint to steal machine keys and maintain access even after affected servers are patched. [...]

items.title: Anubis ransomware claims Coca-Cola Fairlife attack, threatens data leak
items.summary: The Anubis ransomware gang has claimed responsibility for the cyberattack on Coca-Cola's Fairlife dairy subsidiary, threatening to publish allegedly stolen corporate data unless the company pays a ransom. [...]

items.title: Critical wp2shell WordPress flaws exploited to install webshells
items.summary: Hackers are exploiting the "wp2shell" critical vulnerability suite (CVE-2026-63030 and CVE-2026-60137) affecting WordPress Core to deploy persistent webshells and install malicious plugins on affected servers. [...]

items.title: AWS Kiro Flaw Let a Poisoned Web Page Rewrite Its Config and Run Code
items.summary: Hidden text on a web page was enough to make Kiro, AWS's agentic coding IDE, rewrite its own configuration file and run an attacker's code on a developer's machine, with no approval step able to stop it. Intezer, in…

items.title: Google Launches Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber AI to Find and Fix Software Vulnerabilities
items.summary: Google's DeepMind on Tuesday announced the release of Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber, a specialized artificial intelligence (AI) model built atop 3.5 Flash that's designed to discover, validate, and patch vulnerabilities…

items.title: Critical SharePoint RCE CVE-2026-50522 Under Active Exploitation After Public PoC
items.summary: A third SharePoint Server flaw patched by Microsoft as part of its Patch Tuesday update for July 2026 has come under active exploitation, per watchTowr. The vulnerability in question is CVE-2026-50522 (CVSS score: 9.8),…

items.title: Qilin Ransomware Attackers Exploit PAN-OS Authentication Bypass for Initial Access
items.summary: Threat actors have been observed exploiting a now-patched high-severity Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS vulnerability as an entry point to deploy Qilin (aka Agenda) ransomware on victim environments. Arctic Wolf Labs said it…

items.title: Closing the Identity Gaps in Critical Infrastructure Security
items.summary: Critical infrastructure attacks often begin with stolen credentials, compromised devices, or trusted accounts. Specops Software explains why Zero Trust should verify both user identities and device trust before granting…

items.title: Open-Source Android AI Agents Could Let Invisible Screen Text Run Code on Host PCs
items.summary: An Android app that can draw over other windows and write to shared storage can slip instructions to the AI agent driving that phone, in text no human eye will ever see. Two more steps, and the same app is running…

items.title: New HollowGraph Malware Abuses Microsoft 365 Calendar for C&C Communication
items.summary: Part of a larger toolkit, HollowGraph uses a compromised 365 account’s calendar as a two-way dead-drop. The post New HollowGraph Malware Abuses Microsoft 365 Calendar for C&C Communication appeared first on SecurityWeek.

items.title: N-day is Becoming N-Hour. Patching Faster Won't Save You.
items.summary: Every patch is a confession. The moment a vendor ships a security fix, the diff between the old code and the new code tells anyone watching exactly what was broken and where. Turn that diff back into a working exploit,…

items.title: CISO Conversations: Andreas Gaetje – From Economics to CISO at Körber AG
items.summary: Gaetje’s story shows that you don’t need to be a ‘deep bit-crawler’ to become a Chief Information Security Officer. The post CISO Conversations: Andreas Gaetje – From Economics to CISO at Körber AG appeared first on…

items.title: New Bit2Watt Attack Could Let Cloud Tenants Disrupt Power Grids Without an Exploit
items.summary: A cloud tenant using nothing but ordinary GPU access can push a data center's power draw up and down fast enough to threaten the grid it runs on, with no exploit and no break-in. That is the claim behind Bit2Watt,…

items.title: Estée Lauder Discloses Impact From Oracle EBS Zero-Day Hack
items.summary: Hackers exfiltrated personal, financial, and health information from the company’s Oracle EBS instance in August 2025. The post Estée Lauder Discloses Impact From Oracle EBS Zero-Day Hack appeared first on SecurityWeek.

items.title: Meta Paid $78,000 Bounty for Vulnerability Exposing Customer Support Data
items.summary: A security researcher discovered a broken access control vulnerability in Meta’s support infrastructure. The post Meta Paid $78,000 Bounty for Vulnerability Exposing Customer Support Data appeared first on SecurityWeek.

items.title: Critical Palo Alto VPN bug now exploited by Qilin ransomware gang
items.summary: The Qilin ransomware gang is exploiting a critical PAN-OS GlobalProtect authentication bypass flaw to breach victims' networks, according to cybersecurity company Arctic Wolf. [...]

items.title: Clover Health Investments Discloses Data Breach
items.summary: Using social engineering, hackers compromised employee accounts with access to personal and health information. The post Clover Health Investments Discloses Data Breach appeared first on SecurityWeek.

items.title: Microsoft shares manual fix for WSUS sync delays and timeouts
items.summary: Microsoft has shared manual mitigations to help IT administrators fix Windows Server Update Services (WSUS) servers affected by a known issue that causes Windows Update scans to fail or time out. [...]

items.title: WordPress wp2shell Exploitation Grows as Public Exploit Fuels Mass Scanning
items.summary: Attackers have begun to exploit two critical vulnerabilities in WordPress that, when combined together, enable unauthenticated remote code execution (RCE) and complete compromise of vulnerable websites. The two security…

items.title: Exploitation of ServiceNow Vulnerability Seen Days After Disclosure
items.summary: The ServiceNow AI platform vulnerability tracked as CVE-2026-6875 can be exploited for remote code execution. The post Exploitation of ServiceNow Vulnerability Seen Days After Disclosure appeared first on SecurityWeek.

items.title: Windows LegacyHive zero-day flaw gets free, unofficial patches
items.summary: Free unofficial patches are available for a recently disclosed Windows zero-day flaw that allows attackers to escalate privileges on up-to-date Windows systems. [...]

items.title: New ENCFORGE Ransomware Targets AI Model Files in Langflow RCE Attack
items.summary: Researchers at Sysdig have linked a second attack on the same Langflow server to JADEPUFFER, the AI-agent-driven operator it first documented earlier this month. The same operator has now been spotted deploying…

items.title: Critical ServiceNow AI Platform Flaw Exploited for Unauthenticated Code Execution
items.summary: Threat actors are now exploiting a recently disclosed critical security flaw impacting ServiceNow AI Platform, according to Defused Cyber. In a post shared on X, the threat intelligence firm said it's observing…

items.title: แจ้งเตือนช่องโหว่ใน Zoom Workplace บนระบบ Windows ผู้ใช้งานควรเร่งอัปเดตซอฟต์แวร์

items.title: Estée Lauder discloses data breach via Oracle E-Business flaw
items.summary: Cosmetics giant Estée Lauder is notifying employees of a data breach after hackers exploited a flaw in Oracle E-Business Suite that the company used for human resources (HR) operations. [...]

items.title: SonicWall SMA1000 flaws exploited as zero-days to push custom malware
items.summary: Two recently disclosed SonicWall SMA1000 vulnerabilities were exploited in zero-day attacks for weeks, allowing threat actors to install custom malware on vulnerable VPN appliances. [...]

items.title: 'WP2Shell' Opens Millions of WordPress Sites to Remote Takeover
items.summary: Barely three days after disclosure, attackers are widely chaining together CVE-2026-60137 and CVE-2026-63030 to lob exploit attempts against one of the largest attack surfaces on the Internet.

items.title: Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI, Antigravity hit by sandbox escapes
items.summary: Researchers escaped the sandboxes in Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI and Antigravity by having the AI agent write files that trusted host tools later run. Multiple CVEs, patches, and Google downgrading two Antigravity…

items.title: JadePuffer agentic attacks now target AI model data with ransomware
items.summary: The JadePuffer autonomous AI agent has upgraded with custom malware called EncForge that focuses on encrypting AI assets, such as training datasets, vector databases, and model checkpoints. [...]

items.title: Remediating Vulnerabilities With LLMs: Inside Ivanti's Automation Push
items.summary: Ivanti CSO Daniel Spicer says frontier models have shown surprising effectiveness in early stages, but cost and human-in-the-loop viability remain open questions.

items.title: 25 Years After Code Red: What the Worm Era Can Teach Us About AI Security
items.summary: Marc Maiffret reflects on Code Red's legacy and the security lessons helping organizations navigate AI risk today.

items.title: Attackers Combo Up Evasion Tactics for BEC Phishing
items.summary: "The TFF Trap" uses fileless techniques and loaders with low detection rates to deploy various RATs and stealers, including Agent Tesla, Remcos, XWorm, and Best Private Logger.
